R0255.title: Customer Success and Support Ticket Data Leakage
R0255.definition: Customer privacy data, keys, screenshots, and business information in support, CRM, or ticket systems are accessed or exported without authorization.
keywords: Customer Success and Support Ticket Data Leakage
R0255.description: Customer privacy data, keys, screenshots, and business information in support, CRM, or ticket systems are accessed or exported without authorization.
R0255.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
